SEARCH
Package model

Class BJCards

java.lang.Object
model.BJCards
public class BJCards extends Object
The BJCards class represents a deck of cards used in a blackjack game. It includes methods for shuffling the deck and dealing cards.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BJCards.Card
    The Card class represents a single card in the deck.
    static enum 
    BJCards.CardSuits
    The CardSuits enum represents the four suits of cards.
    static enum 
    BJCards.CardValues
    The CardValues enum represents the values of cards.

    The list containing the deck of cards.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BJCards()
    Constructs a new BJCards object and initializes the deck with 6 sets of 52 cards each.

  • Field Details

    • deck

      private List<BJCards.Card> deck
      The list containing the deck of cards.

  • Constructor Details

    • BJCards

      public BJCards()
      Constructs a new BJCards object and initializes the deck with 6 sets of 52 cards each. The deck is shuffled after being created.

  • Method Details

    • countCards

      public int countCards()
      Gets the number of cards remaining in the deck.
      Returns:
      the number of cards in the deck

    • getCard

      public BJCards.Card getCard(int index)
      Gets the card at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the card to retrieve
      Returns:
      the card at the specified index

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle()
      Shuffles the deck of cards. The deck is shuffled twice to ensure randomness.

    • dealCard

      public BJCards.Card dealCard()
      Deals a card from the top of the deck. The card is removed from the deck.
      Returns:
      the dealt card

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Generates a hash code for the BJCards object based on the deck of cards.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Compares this BJCards object to the specified object for equality.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to compare with
      Returns:
      true if the decks are equal, false otherwise
